videoSnippet.title: The Cruelty of Chess || David Navara vs Nodirbek Abdusattorov || Prague Chess Festival 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Navara, David (2628) - Abdusattorov, Nodirbek (2751)
Prague International Chess Festival 2026 | Masters (Chess.com) [08] 2026.03.05
D37 Queen's Gambit Declined, 4.Nf3

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 d5 4.Nc3 dxc4 5.e4 b5 6.e5 Nd5 7.Nxb5 Nb6 8.Be2 Nc6 9.Be3 Be7 10.Nc3 O-O 11.a3 Bb7 12.Qc2 Na5 13.h4 Nd5 14.Ng5 g6 15.Nxd5 Bxd5 16.Ne4 c5 17.dxc5 Nb3 18.Rd1 Bxe4 19.Qxe4 Qa5+ 20.Kf1 Rad8 21.Qxc4 Rxd1+ 22.Bxd1 Nd2+ 23.Bxd2 Qxd2 24.Qc2 Qd4 25.c6 Rb8 26.b4 Rd8 27.c7 Rc8 28.g3 Qxe5 29.Qe2 Qxc7 30.Kg2 Bf6 31.h5 Bd4 32.Qe4 Qc6 33.Re1 Kg7 34.Qxc6 Rxc6 35.Re2 Rc3 36.a4 Ra3 37.hxg6 hxg6 38.f4 Bc3 39.b5 Ba5 40.Rb2 Rd3 41.Bf3 Kf6 42.Rc2 Ra3 43.Rc8 Bb6 44.Rb8 Kf5 45.Rf8 Kf6 46.Rb8 e5 47.fxe5+ Kxe5 48.Re8+ Kd6 49.Bd1 Kd7 50.Re4 f5 51.Rc4 Ra2+ 52.Bc2 Ke6 53.g4 Kd5 54.Rc3 Kd4 55.Rc6 Bc5 56.Rxg6 Rxc2+ 57.Kg3 fxg4 58.a5 Rb2 59.Rxg4+ Kc3 60.b6 Bxb6 61.axb6 axb6 62.Rf4 b5 63.Rf3+ Kb4 64.Kf4 Re2
